description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with exaggerated, stylized proportions and dynamic, angular features. The figure appears to be wearing a wide-brimmed hat and a long, flowing coat or dress with layered elements, giving a sense of motion. The limbs are elongated and bent in dramatic poses, with one leg extended and the other bent, and arms reaching outward. The head is slightly tilted, and the face is partially obscured by the hat and hair, which is styled in long, straight sections. The clothing includes visible trim and layered details, suggesting a fantasy or stylized urban fashion. The overall form is dynamic, with sharp, jutting elements extending from the figure, possibly representing motion or stylized effects.
description: A stylized adult pedestrian in dynamic motion, wearing a wide-brimmed hat and layered, flowing clothing with dramatic, angular features. The figure's limbs and hair are exaggerated, giving a sense of movement and fantasy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide-brimmed hat, face partially visible, and the layered coat or dress with extended limbs and sharp, angular elements.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated arm and leg, with the head turned and hair flowing outward, emphasizing the dynamic pose.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the coat or dress, the bent leg, and the dramatic extension of limbs and angular features.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view showing the layered clothing, the wide-brimmed hat from behind, and the extended arms and legs in motion.
attribute_clothing_type: long coat or dress with wide-brimmed hat and layered, flowing garments
attribute_posture: dynamic, mid-motion pose with limbs extended and body twisted
attribute_hairstyle: long, straight hair with sections framing the face
